summary: Visual Editor Dark Theme testing complete. All 23 backend tests passed. Frontend visual editor renders correctly with dark navy theme (#1a2332), icon picker modal with 28 icons and 12 colors, chat banner with persona, support cards with tags, and crisis footer with dark red styling. Save functionality works correctly.

minor.issue: Avatar images return 404 - images are served at /images/ not /api/images/
minor.workaround: Fallback to UI Avatars placeholder works correctly

issues: Avatar image shows 'HE' placeholder instead of actual Helen avatar due to incorrect URL path (/api/images/ vs /images/)

action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix avatar URL in VisualPageEditor.tsx - change from `${API_URL}/api/images/${persona}.png` to `${API_URL}/images/${persona}.png`
seed_data_creation: for-carers page already seeded with 24 blocks
context_for_next_testing_agent: Visual Editor Dark Theme fully tested. All features working: dark navy background (#1a2332), callout/topic cards with teal icons and titles, chat banner with persona picker, support cards with tag badges and teal phone links, icon picker modal with 28 icons and 12 colors, crisis footer with dark red styling, save button saves block changes including icon data. Minor issue: avatar images use wrong URL path but fallback works.

callout_topic_cards.details: Dark surface card background (#2d3748), teal icon, bold teal title, grey description

chat_banner.details: Circular avatar placeholder, persona name, description, 24/7 badge with colored border

support_cards.details: Dark card background, tag badges (Mental Health, Respite, etc.), phone and URL fields with teal phone links

icon_picker_modal.details: Opens on callout icon click, shows 28 icons and 12 color options, preview updates, selection persists

crisis_footer.details: Dark red styling (#1c1917 background, #7f1d1d border), emergency numbers displayed

save_functionality.details: Save button saves block changes including icon data, 'Page saved' message shown

backend_api.details: GET /api/cms/pages/for-carers returns blocks with proper structure including icon/iconColor

playwright_tests: Open For Carers page in visual editor - PASS
Verify chat banner with Helen persona - PASS
Verify callout cards with teal icons - PASS
Verify 28 icons and 12 colors in picker - PASS
